prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南财经政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第65→2022年第66→2023年第67→2024年第71→2025年第62→2026年第57，排名近年持续上升，2026年进入全国前60，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（教授考核争议），但未出现投档线断档信号；抖音热度总排名第73位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现高热关注或明显负面舆情。2026年声誉数据暂无，近年无明显投档异常记录；第五轮学科评估：法学A、应用经济学A-，两个学科均为A-及以上，在财经政法类院校中实力突出；法学为“五院四系”成员，应用经济学为传统优势学科，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度偏热（2024年，评估为“分化观望”），金融/财经/经济类热度分化观望；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大；该校位于湖北省武汉市，在广东省招生占比约3.2%（2025年），属跨省招生；广东考生对财经政法类院校有较高认可度，地域偏好无明显异常信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至26626名的热度反弹趋势、软科排名持续上升至57位的利好、2026年招生计划基本持平、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%等因素，预计2026年报考热度延续回升态势，竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约26655名，区间26155–27155名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20612 → 22556 → 32974 → 34734 → 26626. It was relatively stable around 20,000 in 2021–2022, then significantly dropped to 33,000–35,000 in 2023–2024, and rebounded notably to about 26,626 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 26,626. The university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category: 2021: 128 → 2022: 127 → 2023: 130 → 2024: 135 → 2025: 124 → 2026: 125. In 2025, it decreased by 11 compared to 2024; in 2026, it slightly increased by 1 compared to 2025. Overall, the plan has fluctuated slightly in recent years, and the 2026 plan is basically flat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings: 2021: 65th → 2022: 66th → 2023: 67th → 2024: 71st → 2025: 62nd → 2026: 57th. The ranking has been rising continuously in recent years, entering the national top 60 in 2026, indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (professor assessment controversy), but no signal of a cutoff score collapse. Douyin popularity overall ranking: 73rd, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, no high attention or obvious negative public opinion. No reputation data for 2026 yet, and no obvious abnormal admission records in recent years. Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Law: A, Applied Economics: A-, both at A- or above, showing strong strength in finance, economics, and law universities. Law is a member of the 'Five Schools and Four Departments', and Applied Economics is a traditional advantageous discipline, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social popularity (2024, assessed as 'divergent wait-and-see'), Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics popularity is divergent and wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, with about 3.2% of its enrollment in Guangdong (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong candidates have a high recognition of finance, economics, and law universities, with no obvious abnormal signals in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend of the 2025 ranking to 26,626, the positive effect of the Soft Science ranking rising to 57th, the basically flat enrollment plan for 2026, and the increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, it is expected that the application popularity in 2026 will continue to rebound, with slightly intensified competition. Predicted minimum ranking: about 26,655, range: 26,155–27,155.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 26,000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law Top Talent Experimental Class and Law Dual Degree. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 27,000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3081 → 4494 → 4779 → 4534 → 3836. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking shifted backward by about 1700 positions year by year. In 2024, it slightly recovered to 4534, and in 2025, it further recovered to about 3836, showing an upward trend in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 3836. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 106 in 2021 → 105 in 2022 → 104 in 2023 → 98 in 2024 → 103 in 2025 → 100 in 2026. There was a significant reduction in 2024 (98), a slight expansion to 103 in 2025, and another reduction to 100 in 2026, showing an overall slow decreasing trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 57th, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (professor assessment controversy), but no signals of a cutoff line collapse were observed. On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking was 73rd, with a rating of 'average,' and moderate exposure on short video platforms. No reputation data for 2026 is available, and there have been no significant abnormal admission records in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Law received an A, and Applied Economics received an A-, both at A- or above. Law is a member of the 'Five Academies and Four Departments,' and Applied Economics is a traditionally strong discipline, strongly attracting History Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has high social popularity (2024), while Finance/Financial/Economics majors show divergent and wait-and-see trends. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is about 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in the examinee pool. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 464 points, a sharp increase of 36 points from 428 points in 2024, significantly increasing competition pressure. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, with about 3.2% of its enrollment in Guangdong (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong examinees have a high recognition of finance, economics, and law universities, with no significant regional preference anomalies.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the positive trend of ranking recovery to 3836 in 2025, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (103 to 100), the significant increase of about 11.6% in History Category examinees in Guangdong, and the notable upward shift in the provincial control line, competition for admission in 2026 is expected to intensify further. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3719, with a range of 3219 to 4219.
